mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua花费45步反复放大检查Opacity下拉箭头(v)位置。在多级缩放下观测：Opacity v按钮宽约40px，v字符宽约14px，左padding约12px右padding约12px，水平方向看起来大致居中。但pixel级别偏移(1-2px)无法通过截图视觉检查确认。与Mode下拉v按钮对比，结构类似。因无法确定是否存在轻微偏移，标记unclear。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The v character in the Opacity dropdown button appears approximately centered at multiple zoom levels (175%-250%), but a 1-2px horizontal offset cannot be definitively confirmed or ruled out through visual inspection alone.
